Footer.address2: Central Park, Jl. Sparman 28, West Jakarta

Hero.title: Premium Indonesian Patchouli Oil Supplier
Hero.description: Arova is an Indonesian trading company specializing in the production and export of high-quality patchouli oil. We manage our supply chain from cultivation to export to ensure consistency, traceability, and reliability.

About.title: Aroma of Excellence
About.description: Located in Kepulauan Banggai, Sulawesi, our patchouli is grown in an optimal tropical climate known for producing oil with a rich, earthy, and long‑lasting aroma profile.

CTA.text:
Let’s Grow Together
for a Better World

ProductHero.headline: Patchouli Oil
ProductHero.description: Premium steam‐distilled patchouli oil sourced from Sulawesi, Indonesia. Our patchouli oil meets a Standard PA level of 30% and above, ensuring a richer, more stable, and higher-grade aroma profile compared to lower-PA oils.

ProductSupply.title: Available Supply
ProductSupply.description: Arova provides large quantities of supplies for industrial use and special specifications upon request.
